insights: AI/ML integration is now foundational across all senior engineering roles.
Full-stack and cloud fluency remains paramount with strong AWS and REST API demand.
Leadership roles now require deep technical depth in APIs and AI/ML.
post:
AI/ML expertise is now foundational. Senior engineers must integrate it across their work.

This week: 31 global remote jobs analyzed. Top skills: AI/ML, REST APIs, AWS, Automation.
